metadata.description: Master registry of ALL data sources - what we have AND what we could get

statewide.name: Alabama Statewide Parcels
statewide.notes: Have 4 county files, no statewide source found yet

AZ.name: Arizona

statewide.name: Arizona State Land Department
statewide.notes: Have 12/15 counties (80% coverage): Maricopa, Pima, Pinal, Yavapai, Yuma, Cochise, La Paz, Greenlee, Graham, Gila, Apache, Santa Cruz

apache.name: Apache County
apache.notes: Via Arizona Department of Water Resources, NAD83 UTM Zone 12N (EPSG:26912)

navajo.name: Navajo County
navajo.notes: Navajo County parcels - population ~108,000. Includes Holbrook, Show Low, and Winslow areas.

cochise.name: Cochise County
cochise.notes: Sierra Vista, Fort Huachuca - received 62K of 124K advertised records

coconino.name: Coconino County
coconino.notes: Northern Arizona county (population ~145K), includes Flagstaff and Grand Canyon

la_paz.name: La Paz County
la_paz.notes: Western Arizona county (population ~20K), borders California and Colorado River

greenlee.name: Greenlee County
greenlee.notes: Eastern Arizona county (population ~10K), smallest AZ county by population, includes Clifton and Morenci

graham.name: Graham County
graham.notes: Downloaded from Arizona Department of Water Resources portal. Data last updated from November 2023 source.

gila.name: Gila County
gila.notes: Central Arizona county (population ~54K), includes Globe and Payson

santa_cruz.name: Santa Cruz County
santa_cruz.notes: Southern Arizona county (population ~47K), includes Nogales. Daily updates per assessor.

mohave.name: Mohave County
mohave.notes: Northwestern Arizona county (population ~213K), includes Lake Havasu City and Kingman

AZ.notes: Have 12/15 counties (80% coverage): Maricopa, Pima, Pinal, Yavapai, Yuma, Cochise, La Paz, Greenlee, Graham, Gila, Apache, Mohave

statewide.name: California State Geoportal
statewide.notes: Major cities only - need statewide source. Check county assessors.

statewide.name: Georgia GIS Clearinghouse
statewide.notes: Have Atlanta metro counties, need more coverage

statewide.name: Illinois State Geological Survey
statewide.notes: Have Chicago metro, Rockford area. Need statewide

kane.notes: Accessed via ArcGIS Online (requires Referer header). 185K parcels.

winnebago.notes: Winnebago County (Rockford area) - 120K parcels from WinGIS MapServer layer 11

daviess.name: Daviess County (Owensboro)
daviess.notes: Complete Daviess County coverage via Owensboro Metro Planning Commission (OMPC)

statewide.name: Louisiana GIS
statewide.notes: 14/64 parishes (21.9%). NO statewide database. Each parish uses proprietary systems.

ascension.name: Ascension Parish (Gonzales area)
ascension.notes: Complete parish coverage. Data in Louisiana State Plane South (EPSG:3452/102682). Includes Gonzales area.

st_tammany.name: St. Tammany Parish (North Shore)
st_tammany.failure_reason: All connection attempts timeout (15-30s). Endpoint exists but blocked by firewall/IP restrictions. Requires parish network access or authentication.
st_tammany.notes: BLOCKED - PRIORITY 1 (hunting area). Endpoint confirmed but unreachable. Atlas/GeoPortal Maps system. Server migrating to geosync.io Feb 2026. Contact: mmcneil@stpao.org, gis@stpgov.org for bulk data export.
st_tammany.alternative_access: Email GIS contacts for bulk export, wait for geosync.io migration (Feb 15, 2026), or use commercial provider (Regrid)

livingston.name: Livingston Parish
livingston.notes: DEPLOYED! Atlas/GeoPortal Maps hosted via utility.arcgis.com MapServer. API returns WGS84 directly. Priority hunting area. 84,692 parcels, 53MB PMTiles.
livingston.assessor: Livingston Parish Assessor, 20400 Government Blvd., Livingston, LA 70754

tangipahoa.name: Tangipahoa Parish (Hammond)
tangipahoa.notes: Hammond area. Data updated every 3 weeks. TanGIS parish ArcGIS server. 75,919 parcels, 31MB PMTiles.

rapides.name: Rapides Parish (Alexandria)
rapides.format: Proprietary web portal - NO public REST API
rapides.notes: PRIORITY 4. Rapides Area Planning Commission (RAPC) GIS. No standard REST access.

bossier.name: Bossier Parish (Bossier City)
bossier.notes: Discovered working MapServer endpoint behind GeoPortal Maps interface. Data in Web Mercator (EPSG:3857).

natchitoches.name: Natchitoches Parish
natchitoches.format: QGIS WMS/WFS - NO public REST API
natchitoches.failure_reason: Parish uses QGIS backend (not ArcGIS). Internal server at 192.168.60.130 not publicly accessible. GeoPortal Maps interface is frontend only. No REST API available.
natchitoches.notes: INCOMPATIBLE BACKEND. Uses QGIS MapServer instead of ArcGIS. Cannot be downloaded via REST API. Contact assessor at (318) 352-2377 for bulk data export. Alternative: Purchase from Regrid (~$200-500).
natchitoches.assessor: Natchitoches Parish Assessor - Dollie C. Mahoney, CLA
natchitoches.alternative_access: Contact assessor directly for bulk export, or purchase from Regrid

beauregard.name: Beauregard Parish (DeRidder)
beauregard.format: Unknown - No public REST API found
beauregard.failure_reason: Extensive search found no working ArcGIS REST API endpoint. Atlas GeoPortal Maps portal exists but backend API not accessible. Assessor website has limited public GIS access.
beauregard.notes: NO PUBLIC API FOUND. Commercial providers (Regrid, Mapping Solutions GIS) have data, indicating it exists but not publicly accessible. Likely uses proprietary system (possibly Qpublic.net) or requires authentication. Contact assessor for bulk data request.
beauregard.assessor: Beauregard Parish Assessor, 214 West 2nd Street, DeRidder LA 70634, Phone: 337-463-8945
beauregard.alternative_access: Contact assessor directly for bulk shapefile/geodatabase export, or purchase from commercial provider (Regrid, etc)

iberville.name: Iberville Parish (Plaquemine)
iberville.notes: Complete parish coverage via CSRS Engineering FeatureServer. Data returned in WGS84. River parishes area between Baton Rouge and New Orleans. 17,471 parcels, 30.3MB PMTiles.

st_mary.name: St. Mary Parish (Morgan City)
st_mary.format: ViewPro GIS (no public REST API found)
st_mary.failure_reason: Extensive search found no working ArcGIS REST API endpoint. Uses ViewPro GIS and Atlas GeoPortal Maps viewers, but backend REST APIs not publicly accessible.
st_mary.notes: PENDING MIGRATION - Assessor migrating to geosync.io platform on February 1, 2026. Modern platforms typically provide REST API access. Check back after migration for new API endpoints. ViewPro GIS viewer exists but no public REST API discovered. Commercial providers (Regrid) have data.
st_mary.alternative_access: WAIT for geosync.io migration (Feb 1, 2026), contact assessor for bulk export, or purchase from commercial provider (Regrid)

st_martin.name: St. Martin Parish (Breaux Bridge/St. Martinville)
st_martin.format: GeoPortal Maps (no public REST API found)
st_martin.failure_reason: Extensive investigation found no working ArcGIS REST API endpoint. Parish uses Atlas GeoPortal Maps platform (hosted on services.geoportalmaps.com), but the MapServer endpoint 'StMartin_Public' returns 404. Discovered utility.arcgis.com server ID (0317e854a601d41dcca5b60102028004) but it contains no services. Backend API is either restricted, requires authentication, or uses non-standard system.
st_martin.notes: NO PUBLIC API FOUND. GeoPortal Maps interactive portal exists with nightly updates of tax roll records and parcel graphics. Commercial providers (Regrid, Dynamo Spatial) have data (42,937 properties), indicating data exists but is not publicly accessible via REST API. Contact assessor's office for bulk shapefile/geodatabase export.
st_martin.assessor: St. Martin Parish Assessor's Office, 415 Saint Martin Street, St. Martinville, LA 70582
st_martin.alternative_access: Contact assessor directly for bulk shapefile/geodatabase export, or purchase from commercial provider (Regrid, Dynamo Spatial)

investigation_details.result: All endpoints return 404 or empty services

plaquemines.name: Plaquemines Parish (Belle Chasse area)
plaquemines.notes: Complete parish coverage via GDIT-hosted FeatureServer. Data in Louisiana State Plane South (EPSG:3452/102682), API returns WGS84 on request. Southernmost Louisiana parish along Mississippi River delta. 18,265 parcels, 9.9MB PMTiles. Discovered via ArcGIS Online search.

webster.name: Webster Parish (Minden)
webster.failure_reason: Portal uses internal QGIS MapServer on 192.168.x.x network (not publicly accessible). GeoPortal Maps/GCT platform with backend on private network. No ArcGIS REST API found after extensive search.
webster.notes: NO PUBLIC API - Uses GeoPortal Maps (GCT/Geosync) platform with QGIS MapServer backend on internal network. Similar to Beauregard Parish pattern. Commercial providers (Regrid, Dynamo Spatial) have data (~61K parcels), indicating data exists but not publicly accessible. Contact assessor for bulk shapefile/GeoJSON export.
webster.alternative_access: Contact assessor directly for bulk data export, or purchase from commercial provider (Regrid ~$500, Dynamo Spatial)

evangeline.name: Evangeline Parish (Ville Platte)
evangeline.failure_reason: Extensive search found no working ArcGIS REST API endpoint. Parish GIS service shows 'Coming Soon'. Qpublic portal returns 404. Commercial providers (Regrid) have data, indicating it exists but not publicly accessible via REST API.
evangeline.notes: NO PUBLIC API FOUND. Parish GIS service launching soon. Commercial data available via Regrid (~30K parcels). Contact assessor for bulk export or wait for public GIS launch (Q2 2026).
evangeline.assessor: Chris Guillory, Assessor, 200 Court Street, Ville Platte LA 70586, Phone: 337-363-4310
evangeline.alternative_access: Contact assessor for bulk export, purchase from Regrid (~$200-500), or wait for GIS service launch (Q2 2026)

West Baton Rouge.name: West Baton Rouge Parish
West Baton Rouge.notes: Uses Total Land Solutions proprietary mapping platform. No public ArcGIS REST API or downloadable data. Options: (1) Contact parish at 225-383-4755, (2) Purchase from Regrid, (3) Manual export if available

statewide.name: Michigan Open Data Portal
statewide.notes: Have Detroit metro, Grand Rapids area, Monroe. Priority missing: Ingham (Lansing), Saginaw, Berrien, Bay, Jackson

monroe.name: Monroe County
monroe.notes: Complete Monroe County - 7,731 parcels, 3.5MB PMTiles. DEPLOYED.

ingham.name: Ingham County (Lansing)
ingham.notes: MSU RS&GIS hosted, endpoint not discovered. Ingham folder exists but empty.

saginaw.name: Saginaw County
saginaw.notes: Uses SAGA GIS/FetchGIS viewer, backend endpoint not discovered

jackson.name: Jackson County
jackson.notes: MapServer (not FeatureServer) - requires different query approach

berrien.name: Berrien County
berrien.notes: Uses Beacon/Schneider system, may need proprietary API approach

bay.name: Bay County
bay.notes: Has ArcGIS Open Data portal, parcel FeatureServer not yet identified

statewide.name: Mississippi Geospatial Clearinghouse
statewide.notes: Have Jackson area and Memphis suburbs

statewide.name: Missouri Spatial Data Information Service
statewide.notes: Have Kansas City, St. Louis metro, and Springfield areas

st_louis_county.name: St. Louis County
st_louis_county.notes: St. Louis metro area (NOT St. Louis City which is separate)

Lancaster.name: Lancaster County (Lincoln - state capital)
Lancaster.notes: Complete Lancaster County coverage - state capital

statewide.name: NC OneMap
statewide.notes: Complete statewide coverage with multiple projections

Washington.name: Washington County, Oregon
Washington.notes: Complete Washington County coverage. 606K population. Self-signed SSL cert.

statewide.name: RIGIS
statewide.notes: PRIORITY: Need to discover API endpoint. Check rigis.org

SC.name: South Carolina

york.name: York County
york.notes: York County - 282K population. Rock Hill area.

lexington.name: Lexington County
lexington.notes: Lexington County - 296K population. Columbia metro area.

SC.notes: Have 5 counties (10% coverage): Charleston, Greenville, Spartanburg, York, Lexington

statewide.name: TNRIS StratMap
statewide.notes: Have statewide but county-level extraction is partial

montgomery.name: Montgomery County (The Woodlands)
montgomery.notes: The Woodlands, Conroe area - HIGH PRIORITY

pad_us.name: PAD-US (Protected Areas Database)
pad_us.notes: Public lands, parks, wilderness areas, conservation easements

hifld.name: HIFLD Facilities
hifld.notes: Fire stations, police, hospitals, schools, etc.

fema_flood.name: FEMA Flood Zones
fema_flood.notes: National Flood Hazard Layer - coverage varies by county
